occurrence_sentence: A team of researchers from California Institute of Technology recently introduced a new method that can be used to predict multiple properties of complex quantum systems from a limited number of measurements, according to Phys.org.
"During my undergraduate, my research centered on statistical machine learning and deep learning," Hsin-Yuan Huang, one of the researchers who carried out the study, told Phys.org.
This was my aspiration when I started my Ph.D. at Caltech.

interaction_phrase: Richard Kueng and John Preskill's expertise
occurrence_sentence: "To build a rigorous foundation for how machines can perceive quantum systems, we combined my previous knowledge about statistical learning theory with Richard Kueng and John Preskill's expertise on a beautiful mathematical theory known as unitary t-design," Huang said.
